title: Tiny Reader Theater
description: A spoken decodable-story game where kids tap the word card or actor card that completes a tiny theater line.
learningGoals: Use oral story context to choose a decodable word
Connect printed word cards to familiar picture prompts
Participate physically by acting out story lines
interactionModel: choose-one tap the word or character card after a spoken theater prompt
feedbackModel: Correct cards sparkle and prompt acting; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken nudge, and replay the line.

modes.title: Fill the Story
modes.skill: context-based decoding of short CVC words

credits: Shared QLOBE object cards, text cards, and emoji placeholders. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
